name: testflight_feedback
description: Fetch screenshot feedback from TestFlight. Returns feedback metadata including device info, user comments, and screenshot URLs.

bundleId.description: The bundle ID of the app (e.g., com.example.myapp)

limit.description: Maximum number of feedback submissions to return (default: 20, max: 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response, to fetch the next page
